segments.text: Ma'am, I'm Dr. Tehreen, calling on behalf of Tata AIA. Ma'am, you're comfortable with English language or you prefer some other language?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yeah, ma'am. Yeah, yeah, I am comfortable with English.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: This call shall be recorded, ma'am, for company's quality and audit purpose. Kindly note that the replies and the information provided by you on this call.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Relating to your health and habits shall form a part of your application for insurance. And if the proposal is accepted, it shall form basis of legal contract of insurance between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any incorrect, false statements or replies could have an impact on the contract and may also lead to rejection of the claim later.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yeah, I know, ma'am. I'm aware.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: You are requested to respond thoughtfully and correctly.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: For verification, ma'am, can I know your full name?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Currently you are salaried or self-employed?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I work as an assistant bank manager.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Can I know your Aadhaar card's last four digits?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: 4396. Ma'am, your current location, city, state and country's name?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, in last two years, have you ever smoked or consumed tobacco or nicotine products?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has any doctor ever advised you to reduce or stop alcohol consumption?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever used recreational drugs or narcotics that was not prescribed by a physician?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever been diagnosed, investigated, or treated for any of the following: that is high or low blood pressure, raised cholesterol, triglycerides or lipids?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any chest pain, heaviness, discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, heart valve disorder, congenital heart disease, palpitation, rheumatic fever, shortness of breath, or any other heart conditions?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer or carcinoma in situ, pre-cancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumors, polyps, nodules, cysts, lump or any other growth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Diabetes, raised blood sugar, sugar in urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism or any other thyroid or endocrine disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic recurrent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease or any other respiratory disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or any other disorders of liver?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus, or any other disorders of blood or autoimmune disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, epilepsy, paralysis, weakness of limbs, stroke, transient ischemic attack, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's disease, dementia, Alzheimer's, or any other neurological, nervous or mental health disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, sorry, gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux disease, stomach ulcer, recurrent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, pancreatitis or any other pancreatic or gastrointestinal disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kidney stone, gallstone, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula or any other disorders of kidney, bladder or urinary system?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Recurrent back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophy, deformity, physical disability or any other disorders of muscles, bones, joints, limbs or spine?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, blindness, cataract, glaucoma, impaired sight, double vision or any other disorders of eye?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Deafness, impaired hearing, speech problem, hoarseness of voice, difficulty in swallowing, ear discharge or any other disorders of ears, nose or throat?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Apart from all this, ma'am, is there any other information regarding your health and habits that you would like to share with us, anything else?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: I don't have any bad habits. I'm, uh, I give preference to fitness.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: It's like post-partum. I am a, yeah.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: It's post-partum that I have a four months baby.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: That's why my weight, my BMI is on higher side, otherwise I'm perfectly all right.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Uh, so it was a cesarean section or normal delivery, ma'am?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So currently have you fully recovered, ma'am, from cesarean?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yeah, ma'am, I'm fully recovered, my baby is six months. Or treatment or investigation or symptoms, anything is pending?
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Nothing, ma'am, nothing, nothing. I'm absolutely fine. I'm I'm I'm taking care of everything myself and I'm able to do all my chores, everything. So I'm perfectly fine. I'm not on any medication at all.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, ma'am. In last five years, have you had a medical condition that has required any of the following, that is any abnormal medical findings, pending test results, scheduled planned or prescribed medical tests, like imaging scan reports, example X-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan, biopsy, electrocardiogram, treadmill, endoscopy, colonoscopy, blood or urine test?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Medication or treatment, Pap smear or mammography, sorry?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, medication or treatment that has lasted for more than two weeks or had been referred to a specialist doctor or hospital for any treatment, consultation or investigation?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, was there any inability to perform your daily activities or were you absent from your workplace for more than two consecutive weeks at a time?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you suffered from any congenital defect disorder or any hereditary disease such as cerebral palsy, Down syndrome or polio?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Next question I'm asking for medical verification purpose, ma'am. Do you or your spouse has been tested positive or received any medical advice, treatment or counseling in connection with sexually transmitted diseases including HIV and AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, apart from what you have disclosed, are you experiencing any unexplained weight gain or weight loss or any symptoms that you are likely to seek medical advice, treatment or awaiting any surgical procedure?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Ma'am, when did you have your last period's date?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, I actually had it on 8th of April.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Ma'am, have you suffered from gestational diabetes, pre-eclampsia, or any other pregnancy-related complication?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you suffered from or consulted a doctor for breast lump, breast disease, irregular or painful menstruation, abnormal Pap smear or any other breasts or gynecological conditions such as vaginal disorder, disorder of uterus, ovary or fallopian tubes?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, ma'am. You hereby declare and agree that the answers to the above questions are complete and true. Do you agree?

segments.text: Thank you, ma'am. Thank you for the information and cooperation. Thank you.
